summary: Iteration 5 testing completed: Mobile responsive design and GPU PLU integration both working correctly. All 12 backend tests passed. Mobile view shows full-screen map, bottom navigation bar (Carte/Tableau/CRM), filter/layers bottom sheets. Desktop view maintains sidebar, COUCHES overlay, and S3REnR summary. PLU zones from GPU API return real data (U for urban areas like Calais, N/A for rural areas like Crau). PLU column visible in table with color coding.

issues: Bottom nav bar may be partially hidden by 'Made with Emergent' preview badge - expected in preview mode

passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/france/parcelles/bbox urban area (Calais) returns PLU=U
Backend: GET /api/france/parcelles/bbox rural area (Crau) returns PLU=N or A
Backend: PLU zones vary by location (urban vs rural)
Backend: Response includes gpu_zones_count field
Backend: S3REnR summary endpoint still works (IDF SATURE, PACA ACTIF, HdF ACTIF)
Backend: S3REnR top-opportunities endpoint returns sorted list
Backend: Electrical assets have S3REnR enrichment
Backend: API root returns version info
Backend: Map DC endpoint works (61 DC)
Backend: Map landing points endpoint works (8 LP)
Backend: Map submarine cables endpoint works (15 cables)
Backend: Commune search endpoint works
Frontend Mobile: Map displays full-screen on mobile viewport (390x844)
Frontend Mobile: Bottom navigation bar shows Carte/Tableau/CRM tabs
Frontend Mobile: Search bar visible in top controls
Frontend Mobile: Filter button opens filter panel as bottom sheet
Frontend Mobile: Layers button opens layers control as bottom sheet
Frontend Mobile: Desktop COUCHES overlay hidden on mobile
Frontend Desktop: Navigation visible (Carte/Tableau/CRM)
Frontend Desktop: COUCHES overlay visible
Frontend Desktop: S3REnR summary panel visible in sidebar
Frontend Desktop: PLU column visible in table with color coding (green=U, orange=AU, purple=A, blue=N)
Frontend Desktop: Parcels load correctly from commune search
Frontend: S3REnR MW labels visible on map (28MW, 65MW)

success_rate.frontend: 100% (All mobile responsive and PLU features verified)

seed_data_creation: No seed data - PLU data comes from IGN GPU API, parcels from API Carto IGN
context_for_next_testing_agent: Mobile responsive design fully working: bottom nav bar, filter/layers bottom sheets, full-screen map. GPU PLU integration working: urban areas return U, rural areas return N/A. PLU displayed in table with color coding and in parcel detail panel. S3REnR integration still works. Test with viewport 390x844 for mobile, 1920x1080 for desktop.
